## Discussion

Together with the [doc://com.apple.modelio/documentation/ModelIO/MDLTransform/rotation], [doc://com.apple.modelio/documentation/ModelIO/MDLTransform/scale], and [doc://com.apple.modelio/documentation/ModelIO/MDLTransform/shear] properties, this property defines the local coordinate space for any object affected by the transform, relative to a parent coordinate space. Use the [doc://com.apple.modelio/documentation/ModelIO/MDLTransformComponent/matrix] property to work with the complete transform.

If the transform includes time-based information, reading this property returns the translation as of the earliest time sample (as reported by the [doc://com.apple.modelio/documentation/ModelIO/MDLTransformComponent/minimumTime] property). Writing to this property erases any time-sampled data for the translation factor. To work with time-sampled data from an animated transform, use the [doc://com.apple.modelio/documentation/ModelIO/MDLTransform/translation(atTime:)] and [doc://com.apple.modelio/documentation/ModelIO/MDLTransform/setTranslation(_:forTime:)] methods.

# translation

**Instance Property**

The x-, y-, and z-axis offsets of the transform relative to its parent coordinate space.

## Declaration

```swift
var translation: vector_float3 { get set }
```

## Discussion

Together with the [doc://com.apple.modelio/documentation/ModelIO/MDLTransform/rotation], [doc://com.apple.modelio/documentation/ModelIO/MDLTransform/scale], and [doc://com.apple.modelio/documentation/ModelIO/MDLTransform/shear] properties, this property defines the local coordinate space for any object affected by the transform, relative to a parent coordinate space. Use the [doc://com.apple.modelio/documentation/ModelIO/MDLTransformComponent/matrix] property to work with the complete transform.

If the transform includes time-based information, reading this property returns the translation as of the earliest time sample (as reported by the [doc://com.apple.modelio/documentation/ModelIO/MDLTransformComponent/minimumTime] property). Writing to this property erases any time-sampled data for the translation factor. To work with time-sampled data from an animated transform, use the [doc://com.apple.modelio/documentation/ModelIO/MDLTransform/translation(atTime:)] and [doc://com.apple.modelio/documentation/ModelIO/MDLTransform/setTranslation(_:forTime:)] methods.

## Using Factors of a Static Transform

- **rotation**: The orientation, as a vector of Euler angles in radians, of the transform relative to its parent coordinate space.
- **scale**: The x-, y-, and z-axis scale factors of the transform relative to its parent coordinate space.
- **shear**: The x-, y-, and z-axis shear factors of the transform relative to its parent coordinate space.
- **setIdentity()**: Sets all factors of the transform to those of the identity transformation.
